description: Monitor classify agents inherit the pi session's currently selected model when the classify agent spec omits model; the spec's model field acts as an override. classifyViaAgent (packages/pi-behavior-monitors/index.ts ~1393-1404) resolves a yaml pin via parseModelSpec + registry as before, else uses ctx.model directly and derives the provider/id spec string for trace + synthetic-compiled fields; error only when both are absent. The five bundled classifier agent yamls drop their openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.6 pin and its routing comment. User-directed 2026-07-24.
acceptance_criteria: With no model line in the classify agent yaml, the classify dispatch uses the session's current model: real pi -p run with --model deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash and this tree's built extension produced hedge trace session_start model deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash with a completed classify round-trip
A model line in a project-tier agent yaml overrides the session model: same run shape from a scratch cwd pinning deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro produced trace session_start model deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro
All five bundled classifier yamls carry no model line and no orphaned routing comment
npm run build, npm run check, npm test all exit 0 (209 tests pass)
Package README states inherit-by-default with pin-to-override at the classify step; package CHANGELOG [Unreleased] carries the entry; no stale model claim remains on either README
